question: Where were the Vietnamese specimens described by Kuznetzov in Nedoshivina's 2010 paper eventually deposited? Just give me the city name without abbreviations.

research_queries: Vietnamese specimens Kuznetzov Nedoshivina museum collection
working_plan: Search for the Nedoshivina 2010 paper that mentions Vietnamese specimens described by Kuznetzov
Locate the full paper or detailed citation information
Find the section describing specimen deposition or museum collection details
Extract the city name where specimens were deposited
Verify the city name is correct and remove any abbreviations

solver.reasoning_summary: Found the Nedoshivina 2010 paper titled 'A catalogue of type specimens of the Tortricidae described by V. I. Kuznetzov from Vietnam and deposited in the Zoological Institute, St. Petersburg.' The paper clearly states that all Vietnamese Tortricidae collected by Kuznetzov were deposited in ZISP (Zoological Institute of the Russian Academy of Sciences) in St. Petersburg, Russia. Since the question requests the city name without abbreviations, 'St. Petersburg' becomes 'Saint Petersburg'.

arguments.code:
# Extract key information from the paper about specimen deposition
paper_text = """
A huge amount of lepidopterous material was collected by Kuznetzov in Vietnam and all of it is now deposited in the collection of ZISP. 

All Vietnamese Tortricidae collected by Kuznetzov were arranged taxonomically within the main collection of ZISP.

In 1955 Kuznetzov became a staff member at the Zoological Institute of the Russian Academy of Sciences in Leningrad, Russia (ZISP) where he worked for 52 years.

Title: A catalogue of type specimens of the Tortricidae described by V. I. Kuznetzov from Vietnam and deposited in the Zoological Institute, St. Petersburg
"""

# Key facts:
print("Key information:")
print("1. ZISP = Zoological Institute of the Russian Academy of Sciences")
print("2. Originally in Leningrad, Russia")  
print("3. Paper title mentions 'St. Petersburg'")
print("4. All Vietnamese specimens collected by Kuznetzov deposited in ZISP")
print("5. Leningrad was renamed to St. Petersburg")
print("\nConclusion: Specimens deposited in Saint Petersburg (without abbreviations)")
